description_long: This is a gold-colored convertible car with a highly stylized, angular body design and exposed mechanical components. The vehicle features prominent, flared wheel arches, visible suspension springs, and a low, open cockpit with two seats and a minimalist dashboard. The front end is sharply pointed, with a split hood and no visible grille, while the rear showcases exposed engine parts and a lack of a traditional trunk. The wheels are thin and sport-like, with metallic rims and low-profile tires. The car lacks a roof, emphasizing its convertible nature, and the interior appears to be finished in a combination of metallic and synthetic materials. The overall design is reminiscent of a concept or kit car, blending retro and futuristic elements.
description: A gold, angular convertible car with exposed mechanical parts, flared wheel arches, and an open two-seat cockpit. Its design is futuristic and sporty, with visible suspension and no roof.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the pointed nose, split hood, and open cockpit with two seats.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated body, flared wheel arches, and exposed side suspension.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the exposed engine components, rear suspension, and lack of a trunk.
description_view_3: Rear three-quarter view emphasizing the open cockpit, angular rear fenders, and visible mechanical details.
